hypothesis: In a three-gas Ar/O2/N2 PMMA-etching ICP system, augmenting GraphSAGE node attributes with gas-specific physicochemical descriptors (ionization potential, dominant bond dissociation energy, electron attachment cross section, and PMMA sticking probability) will raise R2 on an unseen-composition Testthresh split by at least 0.03 compared to using hidden-layer features from the single-gas networks alone.
